name: chart-bar-demo
visual_summary: Chart Bar Demo is a chart component that represents data as bars, ideal for visualizing categorical data and comparing different values. It's a simple and easy-to-use component, perfect for adding a touch of interactivity to your charts. Developers can use this component when they need to display complex data in an intuitive way, making it easy for users to understand.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-demo
Description: Chart Bar Demo is a chart component that represents data as bars, ideal for visualizing categorical data and comparing different values. It's a simple and easy-to-use component, perfect for adding a touch of interactivity to your charts. Developers can use this component when they need to display complex data in an intuitive way, making it easy for users to understand.
Style: modern, flat, material-ui
Interactions: hover, clickable, responsive
Tags: chart, data-visualization, categorical-data

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
